title: Assertion Failure in AST Processing: node->bits == v at frontends/ast/ast.cc:855

features.name: ternary operator with string literals in concatenation
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where one branch is a string literal and the other is a type conversion expression, placed inside a concatenation

features.name: nested ternary with string operands in concatenation
features.description: Code should include a concatenation containing nested ternary operators where both branches can be string literals

features.name: concatenation with ternary and ternary condition using string literal
features.description: Code should include a concatenation where a ternary operator's condition itself uses a string literal comparison

features.name: reduction operator on complex nested expression
features.description: Code should include a reduction operator applied to a complex expression with type conversions and unary operators

features.name: bit slice on reg with ternary assignment in always block
features.description: Code should include a bit slice operation on a register with a ternary operator in an always block with non-blocking assignment
